response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong backend and distributed-systems experience with event-driven architectures (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby) and leadership in scaling teams. However, his resume lacks direct experience with agentic AI systems, fintech infrastructure (e.g., credit risk, embedded finance), or regulated environments. His recent role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure, but details are sparse. His background in general-purpose software and open-source contributions is impressive but not fully aligned with the role's fintech/Agentic AI requirements.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed-systems expertise with event-driven architectures
Proven leadership in scaling engineering teams and fostering engineering culture
Extensive experience with open-source contributions and technical mentorship
concerns: No demonstrated experience with agentic AI systems in production environments
Limited fintech-specific expertise (e.g., credit risk, embedded finance, or regulatory compliance)
Lacks hands-on experience with real-time credit decisioning or financial infrastructure
